member.name: T:JG.WorkerKit.IJobHandler`1
member.summary: Defines a handler for a job with typed data.
member.typeparam: The type of the job data.

member.name: M:JG.WorkerKit.IJobHandler`1.HandleAsync(`0,JG.WorkerKit.JobContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles the job execution.
member.returns: A task representing the job execution.

member.name: T:JG.WorkerKit.IJobMiddleware
member.summary: Defines middleware for job execution.

member.name: M:JG.WorkerKit.IJobMiddleware.InvokeAsync(JG.WorkerKit.JobContext,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask})
member.summary: Invokes the middleware.
member.param: The next middleware in the pipeline.
member.returns: A task representing the middleware execution.

member.name: T:JG.WorkerKit.IJobQueue
member.summary: Represents a job queue for enqueuing background work items.

member.name: M:JG.WorkerKit.IJobQueue.EnqueueAsync``2(``1,JG.WorkerKit.JobOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enqueues a job for asynchronous execution.
member.typeparam: The type of the job handler.
The type of the job data.
member.param: The data to pass to the job handler.
member.returns: A task representing the enqueue operation.

member.name: T:JG.WorkerKit.IScheduledTask
member.summary: Defines a scheduled task that can be executed on a recurring basis.

member.name: M:JG.WorkerKit.IScheduledTask.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the scheduled task.
member.returns: A task representing the task execution.

member.name: T:JG.WorkerKit.IScheduler
member.summary: Represents a scheduler for recurring jobs.

member.name: M:JG.WorkerKit.IScheduler.AddRecurringJob``1(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a recurring job with a cron expression.
member.typeparam: The type of the scheduled task.
member.param: The cron expression defining the schedule.

member.name: M:JG.WorkerKit.IScheduler.AddRecurringJob``1(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Adds a recurring job with a time interval.
member.typeparam: The type of the scheduled task.

member.name: T:JG.WorkerKit.Internal.IJobQueueInternal
member.summary: Internal interface for job queue operations.

member.name: M:JG.WorkerKit.Internal.IJobQueueInternal.DequeueAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dequeues a job item from the queue.
member.returns: The dequeued job item, or null if the queue is complete.

member.name: M:JG.WorkerKit.Internal.IJobQueueInternal.Complete
member.summary: Marks the queue as complete for writing.

member.summary: Internal interface for scheduler operations.

member.summary: Represents a job item in the queue.

member.summary: Gets or sets the retry delay strategy.

member.summary: Gets or sets whether to enable dead letter handling.

member.summary: Normal priority.

member.summary: Linear backoff.
